# Support

## Bugs & feature requests

Open an issue: [github.com/ndugram/fasthttp-extension/issues](https://github.com/ndugram/fasthttp-extension/issues)

Use the appropriate template:
- **Bug** → [Bug report](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md)
- **Feature** → [Feature request](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)

## FastHTTP framework questions

For questions about the FastHTTP library itself (not the extension), go to the main repo:
[github.com/ndugram/fasthttp](https://github.com/ndugram/fasthttp)

## Security vulnerabilities

Do **not** open a public issue. Email directly: **n7for8572@gmail.com**

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full policy.
